/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-ar qc libwalk.a  CMakeFiles/walk.dir/walk_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walk.dir/CubicSpline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walk.dir/SmoothSpline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walk.dir/HumanoidModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walk.dir/IKWalk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walk.dir/LegIK.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walk.dir/Polynom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walk.dir/Spline.cpp.o
/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-ranlib libwalk.a
